title: The Elevator
author: Barış Kısır
short_description: A dozen strangers trapped in a Manhattan elevator realize one of them has a bomb and the control panel is counting down.
long_description: Twelve strangers board a midtown Manhattan elevator on a Tuesday morning. Between floors, the car shudders to a halt. The control panel resets to a single red display: 59:59 and counting down. One of the twelve is wearing a bomb vest. Maya Kessler, a former FBI hostage negotiator now working corporate security, recognizes the pattern immediately. With no working phones, thinning oxygen, and a timer that does not pause, she must identify the bomber, keep eleven panicking strangers alive, and find a way out before the numbers hit zero. The Elevator is a taut, real-time thriller about the strangers who save each other when there is nowhere left to run.
main_characters: Maya Kessler - former FBI hostage negotiator, head of corporate security at Meridian Tower
Marcus Webb - former IT engineer for TitanCorp, the bomber
Derek Cole - Army Ranger veteran, medically discharged
James Hollister - CEO of Hollister Textiles
Tanya Mills - pregnant real estate agent
Sister Bernadette - nun from St. Catherine's
Leonard Cross - retired doorman, heart condition
